checkpointRetention.tieredRule: keep generation 1, latest N, every 2 through 100, every 10 through 1000, every 100 after

environment.name: HeadlessGalagai
environment.openingEnemyPolicy: role-gated bootstrap: bees drift/drop, butterflies and bosses can shoot after wave one
environment.antiDropSpam: invalid drops are ignored and penalized
environment.npcAccessibility: pilot observes dangerous enemy shots; enemies observe dangerous pilot bullets and role counts
